rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: haudu, avanu oodoo haage avana klaasnalli yaaruu oodalla.
rows.english: Yes, nobody else studies like him in his class.

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: niivu avanannu noodkolloo haage mokkalannu yaaruu noodkolalla.
rows.english: No body looks after the children. so well as you do.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Look here, you havn't washed the clothes properly.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Look, you should wash clothes like him (as he washes).

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: I will wash in the same way.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: No, you won't, any amount of instruction will not do any good.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: This was made by our cook.

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: haudu avanu adge maadoo haage yaaru maadalla.
rows.english: Its true, nobody cooks like him.
to look after/to take eare of
